name: S2_count_ones
description: Standalone program: returns 255 if no args; else returns (first byte of argv[1]) + (count of '1' digits in all args) modulo 256.
io_hint: When required inputs are missing, take the explicit usage/error path and return the agreed sentinel status. Decide this branch only from input arity and make any access to later inputs unreachable; keep it deterministic and side-effect free.
